description: Identify a certain place or a spatial relationship in the video
example_question_format: What does the person put next to / above / below ... [object/place]?
generation_guideline: Your question should be based on the spatial relationship between objects or places in the video. There should be a reference object and a target object. The target object MAY appear in the middle or go through location changes.

task_qa_example.query: What is beneath the cover of the watch?

proposal.positive: A close-up of the inner mechanism parts of a watch
Gears and springs are seen inside a watch
A hand opens the cover of a watch and shows the inside

proposal.negative: A hand holds a watch with a silver cover
A hand turns a watch showing its face

task_qa_example.query: Where is the woman grilling the meat?

proposal.positive: A woman is grilling meat on a barbecue grill outdoors
A woman is grilling meat on a stove in a kitchen

proposal.negative: A woman is making meat balls
A woman is cutting meat on a cutting board

task_qa_example.query: What do we have today on the magazine stand?

proposal.positive: An egocentric view showing a magazine stand with various magazines in a supermarket
various magazines shown clearly on a magazine stand in a supermarket

proposal.negative: An egocentric view of supermarket shelf with food items
